label.description: Archivo General de Simancas [The General Archive of Simancas] (Simancas, Spain)
Archivo Histórico Nacional [The National Historical Archive] (Madrid, Spain)
Arkhiv vneshnei politiki Rossiiskoi imperii [Archive of Foreign Policy of the Russian Empire] (Moscow, Russia)
Bibliothèque Polonaise de Paris [Polish Library in Paris] (Paris, France)
Otdel rukopisei Rossiiskoi gosudarstvennoi biblioteki [Department of Manuscripts of the Russian State Library] (Moscow, Russia)
Otdel rukopisei Rossiiskoi natsional’noi biblioteki [Department of Manuscripts of the Russian National Library] (Saint Petersburg, Russia)
Rossiiskii gosudarstvennyi arkhiv drevnih aktov [Russian State Archive of Ancient Acts] (Moscow, Russia)
Rossiiskii gosudarstvennyi istoricheskii arkhiv [Russian State Historical Archive] (Saint Petersburg, Russia)
